summary: CRITICAL BUG TEST COMPLETE: Next button in Trip Planner wizard IS WORKING correctly when Golf Groups is selected with other categories (Hotel, Restaurant, Transfer). All test scenarios passed on both desktop and mobile viewports. Budget ranges verified: Moderate €150-€300, Premium €300-€500, Luxury €500+ (per person/day for golf groups).

critical_bug_test_golf_groups_hotel.description: Golf Groups + Hotel + Premium budget - Next button functionality

details.step1_selections: Golf Groups selected, Friends Trip auto-selected, 4-8 players auto-selected, Hotel selected, Premium budget selected

critical_bug_test_golf_groups_restaurant.description: Golf Groups + Restaurant + Moderate budget - Next button functionality

critical_bug_test_golf_groups_transfer.description: Golf Groups + Transfer + Luxury budget - Next button functionality

mobile_test_375x812.description: Full wizard flow on mobile viewport (375x812)

budget_ranges_verification.description: Budget ranges for golf groups show correct per-person/day values

auto_defaults_verification.description: When Golf Groups is selected, defaults are auto-selected

step3_hotel_suggestion.description: Step 3 shows hotel suggestion with nearest golf course info

passed_tests: Golf Groups + Hotel + Premium - Next button enabled and works
Golf Groups + Restaurant + Moderate - Next button enabled and works
Golf Groups + Transfer + Luxury - Next button enabled and works
Vehicle type selector appears when Golf Groups + Transfer selected
Mobile viewport (375x812) - Full wizard flow works
Auto-defaults: Friends Trip and 4-8 players selected when Golf Groups chosen
Step 3 shows hotel with nearest golf course info
Budget label shows 'BUDGET PER PERSON / DAY' for golf groups
critical_code_review_comments: The canNext() logic at line 336 is correctly simplified to: services.length > 0 && budget
Auto-defaults are correctly set in toggleService() at line 319 when golf_groups is selected
context_for_next_testing_agent: The reported bug 'Next button not working when Golf Groups is selected with other categories' could NOT be reproduced. All combinations tested (Golf Groups + Hotel, Golf Groups + Restaurant, Golf Groups + Transfer) work correctly on both desktop and mobile. The Next button is enabled and clicking it successfully transitions to Step 2. Key findings: (1) Auto-defaults are set when Golf Groups is selected (Friends Trip + 4-8 players), (2) Budget ranges are correct (€150-€300, €300-€500, €500+), (3) Full wizard flow completes successfully through all 4 steps.
rca_of_the_issue: BUG COULD NOT BE REPRODUCED. The Next button works correctly in all tested scenarios. Possible explanations for user's reported issue: (1) User may have been testing an older version before the fix, (2) User may have had a browser caching issue, (3) User may not have selected a budget (which is required for Next to be enabled). The current implementation correctly enables the Next button when services.length > 0 && budget is truthy.
